name: Arepas Rellenas Con Guiso De Carne
recipeIngredient: 2 large Tomatoes, peeled and seeded, chopped
recipeInstructions:
Stuffed Arepas From Venezuela
1. Heat oil in a heavy skillet over medium heat.
2. Add meat, onions, garlic, green chile, tomatoes, achiote, cumin, thyme, black pepper, and salt to the skillet.
3. Cook, stirring occasionally, for 20 minutes or until the tomatoes have formed a thick sauce.
4. Stir in olives and capers.
5. Prepare basic arepas according to package instructions.
6. Shape into 3-inch discs (3/4-inch thick).
7. Cook the arepas as directed on the package.
8. Split each arepa in half.
9. Fill with meat sauce.
10. Serve hot.
